info.title: tempera-gym API
info.description: Authenticated task, verifier, episode, environment, trajectory, synchronous rollout, and independent sealed-evaluation surface over the shared Tempera RL substrate. Hand-written; tests/test_service.py contains a drift gate that keeps the (method, path, operationId) triples in lockstep with src/tempera_gym/service.py ROUTES. Ordinary HTTP errors use the AIP-193 google.rpc.Status JSON mapping {"error": {code, message, status, details}}. Auth is a static bearer (TEMPERA_GYM_API_TOKEN) or a centrally introspected token with audience tempera-gym; reads require scope dataset:read, rollout execution requires eval:run.

get.summary: Built-in and boot-trusted versioned environment catalog

200.description: Built-in pack environments plus trusted external definitions; unavailable exact adapter identities remain discoverable but fail closed at execution.

get.summary: Domain capabilities represented in the versioned task catalog
List versioned task definitions without agent inputs

200.description: Task summaries; hidden grader bodies are never returned

get.summary: Get one immutable task definition including its agent-visible input

200.description: Task definition with verifier identity, never grader content

post.summary: Deterministically verify one candidate without creating an episode

get.summary: List verifier identities and bound tasks without grader content
List durable episode snapshots, newest first

post.summary: Reset a versioned task into a durable episode

task.description: Task id or immutable id@semantic-version reference.

201.description: Active episode whose observation is the agent-safe task view

get.summary: Read and content-verify one durable episode snapshot

post.summary: Apply one schema-validated action and persist the transition

200.description: Completed transition, verifier result, and trajectory projection

post.summary: Retain a completed Gym episode and trajectory in Data Engine
post.description: Requires configured Data Engine service credentials. The context EvidenceRecord and PASS verifier receipt artifact must already exist in the configured project. Centrally authenticated callers require both eval:run and dataset:write.

201.description: Data Engine episode plus completed trajectory ingest operation

get.summary: Full trajectory envelope (incl. metadata.timing) for one run

post.summary: Execute one rollout synchronously, store it, return the summary

requestBody.description: JSON request body; rejected when Content-Length exceeds 1 MiB.

environmentId.description: Built-in id or trusted external id, optionally pinned as id@semantic-version.

maxSteps.description: Capped by the environment's manifest max_steps.

model.description: tempera-llm model id; only used when policy is llm.

dataEngineProductId.description: Data Engine product id for a manifest-bound PUBLIC Risk RLVR rollout. Only valid with risk-normalization-verification-v1; the service project and credentials are deployment config. Centrally introspected callers need dataset:read and eval:run, plus org/project/environment/sub claims bound to that config.

202.description: Completed operation envelope (same shape data-engine returns)

get.description: Returns only evaluator and immutable qualification-policy identities. Executable adapters remain process-local and cannot be registered over HTTP.

get.summary: List persisted sealed-evaluation precommits and results

post.summary: Persist an opaque sealed-suite commitment before policy freeze
post.description: Binds exact evaluator, qualification policy, suite commitment, and trainer identities. The request contains no policy, cases, seeds, rows, or labels. A missing exact boot-trusted evaluator fails with 412.

get.summary: Read one verified precommit and aggregate sealed result

200.description: Persisted state and content-addressed result, if complete

post.summary: Evaluate one frozen policy through its exact sealed adapter
post.description: Accepts only opaque frozen-policy and training-report identities. Gym verifies precommit-before-freeze ordering, invokes the boot-trusted adapter, validates aggregate-only output and required receipts, derives distinct official, production-qualification, and improvement claims, then hashes and persists the result. Exact replay is idempotent.

PageSize.name: pageSize
PageSize.description: Maximum resources to return; defaults to 50 and is capped at 1000.

PageToken.name: pageToken
PageToken.description: Opaque continuation token returned by the preceding list response.

SealedEvaluationResult.description: Gym-owned tempera.gym.sealed-evaluation/v1 aggregate. The closed JSON Schema in contracts/sealed-evaluation-v1.schema.json is canonical.

agentInput.description: Present on get; omitted from collection responses.

Environment.description: One built-in pack entry or one resolved tempera.gym.environment/v1 definition. External definitions carry an immutable environment_digest and exact adapter identity.

RunRecord.description: Index record enriched with server-side verification state. `verify` reports the store's content-hash re-derivation for the record's envelope (verification canonicalization lives server-side; clients must not re-implement it). The summary fields (steps, totalReward, terminalReason, durationMs) are present only when verify is "verified"; a tampered or missing envelope marks the record instead of failing the listing.

FailedPrecondition.description: Planned environment or unconfigured data directory

Conflict.description: Episode is complete or was stepped concurrently

Unavailable.description: Upstream (LLM gateway or introspection) failed closed
